arts.ttl: AS Monaco’s Thiago Scuro on Marseille’s resurgence: ‘This is good for the league.’
arts.sum: Olympique de Marseille are used to competing towards the top of Ligue 1, however, that wasn’t the case last season as the club burnt through four managers before missing out…

arts.sum: Neal Maupay (28) has earned himself a reputation for being quite the joker on and especially off the field during his time in the Premier League with Everton and Brentford.…

arts.ttl: ‘I’d end my career before wearing Marseille’s shirt’ – Mamadou Sakho on Adrien Rabiot’s decision

arts.ttl: Elye Wahi and Adrien Rabiot pre-selected by Didier Deschamps
